description: 20 diverse IT scenarios — Set W (post supervisor policy fixes)

cases.title: Forgot BitLocker Recovery Key
cases.description: Locked out of company laptop after BitLocker prompt — recovery key not saved. Need access to files for client presentation today.

cases.title: CEO Impersonation Wire Transfer Email
cases.description: Security incident: finance received urgent wire transfer request email spoofing CEO domain. No funds sent yet — need fraud investigation.

cases.title: SD-WAN Tunnel Down Branch Office
cases.description: SD-WAN overlay tunnel to Austin branch down 3 hours. Users cannot reach file shares or VoIP over corporate network.

cases.title: MongoDB Atlas Cluster Auto-Scale Stuck
cases.description: MongoDB Atlas cluster failed to auto-scale during traffic spike. Application writes timing out with connection pool exhausted.

cases.title: Request Figma Enterprise License
cases.description: Design team needs Figma Enterprise seat for new UX lead starting next week. Standard license request through IT procurement.

cases.title: USB-C Hub Overheating and Disconnecting
cases.description: USB-C hub gets very hot and disconnects all peripherals every 20 minutes. Laptop charging also interrupted.

cases.title: Zero-Day Chrome Vulnerability Advisory
cases.description: Security incident: CISA advisory on active Chrome zero-day exploited in the wild. Need emergency patch rollout guidance for 800 endpoints.

cases.title: Intermittent Packet Loss VoIP Calls
cases.description: VoIP calls dropping every few minutes on floor 6. Ping to gateway shows 15% packet loss during business hours only.

cases.title: Tableau Server Extract Refresh Failed
cases.description: Tableau Server nightly extract refresh failed with database connection error. Executive dashboards show stale data.

cases.title: Contractor AD Account Expired
cases.description: Contractor cannot log in — Active Directory account expired yesterday. Extension approved by sponsor for two more weeks.

cases.title: Isilon Storage Pool Nearly Full
cases.description: Dell Isilon storage pool at 96% capacity. Research datasets share growing 50GB daily — need expansion or tiering plan.

cases.title: Laptop Screen Flickering After Drop
cases.description: Laptop screen flickers and shows horizontal lines after minor drop. External monitor works fine via HDMI.

cases.title: SAP GUI Transaction Timeout
cases.description: SAP GUI freezes on VA01 sales order transaction for all users in EU region. SAP portal web transactions work.

cases.title: Suspicious RDP Login from Foreign IP
cases.description: Security incident: SIEM alert shows successful RDP login to jump server from IP in unknown country at 3am local time.

cases.title: Palo Alto GlobalProtect Profile Error
cases.description: GlobalProtect VPN client shows could not connect to gateway after firewall policy push. Entire sales team remote.

cases.title: Disable MFA for Break Glass Admin
cases.description: Emergency break-glass admin account locked by MFA during datacenter outage. Need controlled MFA bypass per security policy.

cases.title: Cassandra Node Down in Ring
cases.description: Cassandra cluster shows one node down — UN status. Write consistency errors in checkout microservice.

cases.title: Notepad++ Install Request Standard User
cases.description: Developer needs Notepad++ installed for log analysis. Standard user cannot install from Software Center catalog.

cases.title: Wireless Presentation Clicker Dead
cases.description: Logitech presentation remote not pairing with conference room PC. Tried new batteries, USB receiver not detected.

cases.title: GitHub Org 2FA Enforcement Gap
cases.description: Security incident: audit found 15 GitHub org members without 2FA enabled on repos with production deployment keys.
